scripts.title: Base64 Decode Clipboard
scripts.description: Decode Base64 clipboard text and copy back
scripts.author: paletteshell

scripts.title: Transform Text
scripts.description: Apply various transformations to clipboard text with customizable options
scripts.author: paletteshell

scripts.title: Markdown Cheat Sheet
scripts.description: Show a polished Markdown reference with syntax examples, rendered output, and practical tips
scripts.author: phireForge

scripts.title: Regular Expressions Cheat Sheet
scripts.description: Show a practical regular-expression reference with tokens, flags, recipes, and PowerShell examples
scripts.author: phireForge

scripts.title: Join Lines
scripts.description: Take multi-line text from the clipboard and join it into a single comma-delimited line
scripts.author: phireForge

scripts.title: Join Lines (Double Quoted)
scripts.description: Take multi-line text from the clipboard, wrap each line in double quotes, and join into one comma-delimited line
scripts.author: phireForge

scripts.title: Join Lines (Quoted)
scripts.description: Take multi-line text from the clipboard, wrap each line in single quotes, and join into one comma-delimited line
scripts.author: phireForge

scripts.title: Preview Markdown
scripts.description: Take Markdown text from the clipboard and display it rendered in Markdown mode
scripts.author: phireForge

scripts.title: Flush DNS Cache
scripts.description: Clear the Windows DNS resolver cache so the next lookups hit DNS fresh
scripts.author: phireForge

scripts.title: Generate Password
scripts.description: Generate a random password from a form of options and copy it to the clipboard
scripts.author: phireForge

scripts.title: List Processes
scripts.description: Browse running processes sorted by memory use; select one to copy its PID (pair with "Stop Process" to terminate it)
scripts.author: phireForge

scripts.title: Stop Process
scripts.description: Terminate a running process by PID or name. Pairs with "List Processes", which copies a PID you can paste here.
scripts.author: phireForge

scripts.title: Certificate Expiry
scripts.description: Show local certificates that are expired or expiring soon, rendered as Markdown
scripts.author: phireForge

scripts.title: Disk Space
scripts.description: Show disk space statistics for all drives, rendered as Markdown
scripts.author: phireForge

scripts.title: Env Vars to Markdown
scripts.description: Dump the current environment variables as a fenced Markdown code block
scripts.author: phireForge

scripts.title: Event Log Errors
scripts.description: Show recent Windows Event Log errors, rendered as Markdown
scripts.author: phireForge

scripts.title: System Report
scripts.description: Show a quick system summary rendered as Markdown
scripts.author: paletteshell

scripts.title: System Statistics
scripts.description: Show operating system, hardware, memory, disk, network, and process statistics rendered as Markdown
scripts.author: phireForge

scripts.title: Restart Explorer
scripts.description:
Restart the Windows Explorer shell — handy after changing shell settings. Open File
    Explorer windows will close, so it asks for confirmation first (demonstrates
    ConfirmBeforeRun).
scripts.author: paletteshell

scripts.title: Format JSON Clipboard
scripts.description: Pretty-print JSON from clipboard and copy back
scripts.author: paletteshell

scripts.title: Base64 Encode Clipboard
scripts.description: Encode clipboard text to Base64 and copy back
scripts.author: paletteshell

scripts.title: Clean Temp Files
scripts.description:
Delete files in your user TEMP folder older than the given number of days, then report
    how many were removed and how much space was freed. Because it's destructive it asks for
    confirmation first — and since it takes a parameter, the prompt appears after you submit
    the form (demonstrates ConfirmBeforeRun on a parameterized script).
scripts.author: paletteshell

scripts.title: Remove Duplicate Lines
scripts.description: Remove duplicate lines from clipboard text
scripts.author: paletteshell

scripts.title: Sort Lines in Clipboard
scripts.description: Sort clipboard lines alphabetically
scripts.author: paletteshell

scripts.title: Clipboard → CSV (quoted)
scripts.description: Convert multiline clipboard text to comma-delimited, quote-wrapped CSV
scripts.author: paletteshell

scripts.title: Convert to lowercase
scripts.description: Convert clipboard text to lowercase
scripts.author: paletteshell

scripts.title: Convert to UPPERCASE
scripts.description: Convert clipboard text to uppercase
scripts.author: paletteshell

scripts.title: Trim Lines in Clipboard
scripts.description: Remove leading and trailing whitespace from each line
scripts.author: paletteshell

scripts.title: Get Unix Timestamp
scripts.description: Generate current Unix timestamp and copy to clipboard
scripts.author: paletteshell

scripts.title: URL Decode Clipboard
scripts.description: URL decode clipboard text and copy back
scripts.author: paletteshell

scripts.title: URL Encode Clipboard
scripts.description: URL encode clipboard text and copy back
scripts.author: paletteshell

scripts.title: Export Process List → CSV
scripts.description: Snapshot running processes (name, PID, memory, CPU) as CSV and open it in the editor / Excel
scripts.author: paletteshell

scripts.title: Generate GUID
scripts.description:
Generate a new GUID and show it as a result — press Enter to copy it,
    or "Run again" to generate a fresh one.
scripts.author: paletteshell

scripts.title: Get Public IP
scripts.description:
Look up this machine's public IP address and show it as a result —
    press Enter to copy it, or "Run again" to re-check.
scripts.author: paletteshell

scripts.title: Pick a Git Branch
scripts.description:
List the local branches of a Git repository as a searchable, pickable list. Select a
    branch to copy its name. Demonstrates List output mode as a live provider.
scripts.author: paletteshell

scripts.title: Minify JSON Clipboard
scripts.description: Compress JSON from clipboard and copy back
scripts.author: paletteshell

scripts.title: Time Zones
scripts.description: Show current time across all or selected time zones, rendered as Markdown
scripts.author: phireForge
